history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is safe, but moving forward would take me into the open path that leads toward the goal area. Since I am currently facing upward and the goal is above and to the right, the best immediate move is to advance and continue exploring the corridor toward O while avoiding the lava cells on the right.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must not move forward. The goal is visible ahead and to the right, but the path in front is blocked by danger. I will rotate clockwise to reorient toward a safer direction.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible up-left from me, but the cell directly in front is a free floor cell. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal area, while turning is unnecessary right now.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
